provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, portrait head and shoulders, detailed face, man in his late twenties with light brown hair slightly longer than military regulation, easy genuine smile, clean-shaven, slight frontier-station tan, steady hands visible at collar, eyes that track movement without appearing to, muted grey-brown civilian jacket, the kind of face you forget unless he wants you to remember it, easy charm masking something watchful underneath, isolated on plain dark grey background
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero, military uniform, tactical gear, aggressive pose, obvious spy gear, sunglasses, brooding, villainous, bright colors, memorable clothing

identity.scene_function: establish the double-read face — friendly on first look, dangerous on second
